grid_dimensions_as_printed.note: y_chain_m read top-to-bottom as: 1.00 (roof/canopy overhang above row F, not part of the F-A grid chain) / 2.00 (F-E) / 3.70 (E-D) / 2.20 (D-C) / 3.70 (C-B) / 1.80 (B-A) / 2.05 (overhang below row A, not part of the chain). 2.00+3.70+2.20+3.70+1.80=13.40 matches the printed F-A bracket exactly, and matches the grid master's E(11.40)/D(7.70)/C(5.50)/B(1.80)/A(0.0) exactly (13.40-11.40=2.00, 11.40-7.70=3.70, 7.70-5.50=2.20, 5.50-1.80=3.70, 1.80-0=1.80). x_chain_m: 0.60 (left overhang) / 4.00 (grid1-2) / 2.00 (grid2-3) / 3.00 (grid3-4) / 0.50 (right overhang), matching the master's grid2(4.0)/grid3(6.0)/grid4(9.0) exactly. CONFIRMED against บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_03_หน้า00_gridline.json (structural grid master, built from S-02/S-03) -- no dummy grid line is shown on this architecture/sanitary page.

warnings: This floor plan confirms the hypothesis flagged on this house's riser diagram (SN-04, page51): the septic tank and grease-trap equipment ARE shown on this plan (1 septic tank + 2 grease traps) even though the riser diagram itself drew no septic-tank symbol -- so, unlike houses #3/#4 where the septic tank appeared on both the riser diagram AND the floor plan, this house's SN-04 sheet omits it and it only appears here on SN-05.

The 'P/1' and 'P/2' circled markers seen on the riser diagram (page51) are confirmed to also appear on this floor plan, at โถง (hall, near the stairwell) and เตรียมอาหาร (food-prep area) respectively -- most likely stack/riser cross-reference numbers tying the two vertical soil/waste stacks on SN-04 to their physical locations here, but no legend or text definition for the 'P' notation was found on either sheet. Flagged for human review rather than guessed.

Grid (1,2,3,4 x F,E,D,C,B,A) confirmed identical to the structural grid master (หน้า00_gridline.json) built from this house's S-02/S-03 sheets -- no dummy grid line is drawn on this sanitary/architecture sheet.

Exact routing of individual small-diameter branch CW/W pipes into each room, and the precise count/position of every perimeter X-in-square catch-basin symbol (~9 counted, approximate), is difficult to trace precisely at this resolution -- flagged for zoom-review.

The two 'ถังดักไขมันสำเร็จรูป' (grease trap) leader lines and the one 'ถังบำบัดน้ำเสียสำเร็จรูป' (septic tank) leader line point to small circle symbols in a visually dense cluster of pipe/fixture icons near ครัว/เตรียมอาหาร/ห้องน้ำ 1/โถง -- exact which-circle-is-which is best-effort based on leader-line direction, not pixel-traced with certainty; flagged for zoom-review.

This ground-floor plan is expected to pair with an upper-floor plan and a roof-floor plan on the next sheets (SN-06 page53, SN-07 page54 per this house's own index on page48) -- this house's index lists an extra 'แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลพื้นชั้นหลังคา' (roof-floor sanitary plan) sheet not present in houses #3/#4's 10-sheet sets.
